summary: Completed testing of Iteration 102 features: Budget & Expenses Module, Retirement Milestones, and SOA/ROA Compliance. Backend: 19/19 tests passed after fixing MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue. Frontend: Both dashboards working correctly with all tabs and features functional.
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/retirement_milestones.py - Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization in initialize_client_milestones endpoint
seed_data_creation: Test budgets, milestones, and compliance documents created via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Budget & Expenses module provides comprehensive budgeting with income/expense tracking, goals, alerts, and spending analysis. Retirement Milestones tracks 6 categories (accumulation, debt_reduction, insurance, pension, estate, transition) with readiness scoring. SOA/ROA Compliance supports full workflow (draft -> pending_review -> reviewed -> pending_signature -> signed -> implemented). Frontend has two new dashboards accessible via navigation: Financial Dashboard (/financial-dashboard) under FINANCES > Overview, and Adviser Compliance Dashboard (/adviser-compliance).

budget_expenses.GET /api/budget/categories: PASS - Returns 17 expense categories, 9 income categories, 6 frequencies
budget_expenses.GET /api/budget/demo/sample: PASS - Returns demo budget with 3 incomes, 7 expenses, 3 goals
budget_expenses.GET /api/budget/client/{client_id}: PASS - Returns client budget with summary calculations
budget_expenses.POST /api/budget/client/{client_id}: PASS - Creates/updates budget with auto-generated IDs
budget_expenses.GET /api/budget/client/{client_id}/spend: PASS - Returns spending analysis by category

retirement_milestones.GET /api/milestones/templates: PASS - Returns 6 categories with standard milestones
retirement_milestones.GET /api/milestones/client/{client_id}: PASS - Returns milestones with summary stats
retirement_milestones.GET /api/milestones/client/{client_id}/r: PASS - Returns readiness score and category breakdown

soa_roa_compliance.POST /api/compliance-docs/document: PASS - Creates SOA/ROA documents with auto-generated IDs
soa_roa_compliance.GET /api/compliance-docs/client/{client_: PASS - Returns client documents with counts
soa_roa_compliance.PUT /api/compliance-docs/document/{id}/s: PASS - Updates document status with history
soa_roa_compliance.GET /api/compliance-docs/reviews/due: PASS - Returns due and overdue reviews

frontend_financial_dashboard.page_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with all components
frontend_financial_dashboard.summary_cards: PASS - Monthly Income, Monthly Expenses, Monthly Surplus, Goal Progress cards visible
frontend_financial_dashboard.five_tabs: PASS - Overview, Budget, Expenses, Goals, Milestones tabs present
frontend_financial_dashboard.income_sources: PASS - Shows income sources with amounts and frequencies
frontend_financial_dashboard.expenses_by_category: PASS - Shows expenses breakdown with progress bars
frontend_financial_dashboard.navigation: PASS - Accessible via FINANCES > Overview (NEW) in sidebar

frontend_adviser_compliance.page_loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with all components
frontend_adviser_compliance.summary_cards: PASS - Total Documents, Pending Review, Overdue Reviews, Implemented cards visible
frontend_adviser_compliance.four_tabs: PASS - All Documents, Pending Review, Reviews Due, Workflow tabs present
frontend_adviser_compliance.new_soa_roa_button: PASS - Button visible and opens create dialog

bug_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in /api/milestones/client/{client_id}/initialize endpoint
bug_fixed.root_cause: insert_many() adds _id to each document dict, which is not JSON serializable
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added loop to remove _id from milestones list before returning response
